overview: Mediyra Lab is a B2B pathology lab platform for collection center owners to book patient tests, track samples, download reports, and manage billing. The admin panel gives lab staff full control over centers, tests, bookings, reports, payments, and analytics.
features: Admin dashboard with live stats (total bookings, today's samples, pending reports, monthly revenue)
Full booking/sample management with status updates and PDF report upload
Collection center management with credentials and pricing
Analytics: daily bookings, test-wise revenue, partner performance
Redesigned login pages (collection center + admin) with clean medical UI
Role-based access control (admin vs collection center)
